component.name: Katten
component.summary: Mistral AI Vibe integration for KRunner

description.p: Katten is a KDE Plasma KRunner plugin that allows you to send prompts to Mistral AI's Vibe service directly from KRunner (Alt+Space). It features a preview panel with full markdown rendering support for tables, code blocks, lists, and more.

Features:
Send prompts to Mistral AI directly from KRunner
Web search enabled by default (Vibe searches the internet)
Preview panel with full markdown rendering (tables, code blocks, lists, etc.)
Multiple trigger keywords: katten, lechat, lc, mistral, vibe, mv
Persistent loading notification
Fallback to simple API when web search fails
Warning message when fallback is used
Open conversation in browser
Copy responses to clipboard
XML conversation history logging

ul.li: Complete web search fallback warning implementation
Fixed DBus service file path expansion
Fallback to simple API when web search fails
Warning message displayed when fallback is used
